# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  vaultName:
    type: string
    default: MyKeyVault
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: '2019-09-01'
    name: {{copyIndex()}}-{{parameters('vaultName')}}
    location: {{resourceGroup().location}}
    properties:
      enableRbacAuthorization: true
      enabledForDeployment: false
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
      accessPolicies: []
    dependsOn: 
      - Microsoft.Resources/deployments
      - resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('vaultName'))
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: '[[variables(concat('contributor',copyindex()))]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/xxxxxxx-yyyyyyy-zzzzzzz/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c'
      principalId: 'xxxxxxx-yyyyyyy-zzzzzzz'
    dependsOn: 
      - Microsoft.Resources/deployments
      - resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('vaultName'))
